sections.title: Three commands to publish
sections.description: Every command runs in Claude Code. No browser canvas, no chat UI.

items.title: Sign in
items.description: Run /signin once per machine. Authorize in the browser; the CLI captures the token.

items.title: Create the site
items.description: /new my-landing-page scaffolds source/ and reserves my-landing-page.supa.page.

items.title: Edit + publish
items.description: Edit JSON / Markdown with Claude. /publish snapshots source/ and flips production.
